scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "!./artifacts/banco-web" --filter "!./artifacts/landing" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.typecheck:website: pnpm --filter @workspace/design-tokens run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/search-contract run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/landing run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/banco-web run typecheck
scripts.ops:full-verify: node scripts/production-confidence-check.mjs --skip-typecheck && node artifacts/banco-mobile/tests/lib-hardening.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @workspace/search-contract run test
